content_markdown:
# Unwavering Resolve
## Scripture
"And let us run with perseverance the race marked out for us, 2 fixing our eyes on Jesus, the pioneer and perfecter of faith." – Hebrews 12:1-2
## Reflection
As men, we often face obstacles and challenges that test our resolve. It's easy to give up when things get tough, but the Bible calls us to persevere, to keep running the race. We must fix our eyes on Jesus, the one who has gone before us and paved the way. He is our perfect example, our pioneer, and our rock. When we focus on Him, we gain the strength and courage to press on, even when the going gets tough.

In a world that constantly tries to distract and discourage us, we must be men of unwavering resolve. We must be men who are committed to our faith, to our families, and to our communities. We must be men who are willing to stand up for what we believe in, even when it's hard. Let us run with perseverance, fixing our eyes on Jesus, and trusting in His power to carry us through.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 10 burpees while repeating the phrase 'I will fix my eyes on Jesus'."
